name: Easy Crock Pot Mexican Chili
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces green chili peppers, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a skillet and drain excess fat.
2. Place all ingredients into the crock pot.
3. Cover and cook on low heat for 8 to 10 hours.
4. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
5. Stir the chili gently before serving.
6. Approximately 10 servings; pairs well with cornbread.
